evidence: Revoke exists only on normal continuation after an await and ToolProxy enforces no TTL maximum.
Dropping invoke after mint and before line 429 skips subsequent revoke; no scope guard or cancellation handler exists.
proof_gap: No production minter or enforced broker TTL was found to establish residual authority duration.

source: Cancellation or shutdown after credential mint.
closest_control: Normal-path best-effort revoke plus external TTL.
sink_or_broken_control: Credential lease can remain valid after local call termination.

attack_path.attacker: caller or failure condition able to cancel an invocation
preconditions: production minter issues a nontrivial lease

proof_gap: External TTL and credential usability unknown.
